svg.title: SoundTag federated learning system diagram v2
svg.desc: Full system diagram showing data collection clients, feature extraction pipeline, ML and DL training phases, federated learning framework, model export, and edge deployment.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Android client')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the web client')
sendPrompt('What is the JSON metadata schema?')
sendPrompt('How does the Google Drive upload work?')
sendPrompt('Explain the server-side feature extraction pipeline')
g.text: Chunk audio → mel spectrogram or 171-dim MFCC vector → .npy manifest

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the classical ML baseline phase')
sendPrompt('Tell me about SoundTagCNN and CRNN trained from scratch')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI HTTP bridge work for mobile clients?')
g.text: Proxies weight uploads from Android + web → Flower server

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why use Redis for the async weight queue?')

g.text: Anomaly filter + per-class weighted loss + round management

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the central server model do after aggregation?')
g.text: Val accuracy check → publish or rollback (5 versions kept)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the model exported to TFLite for Android?')
sendPrompt('How is the model exported to TF.js for web?')

svg.text: ↻ Clients pull updated model → annotate → upload new weights → next round
